---
title: "cluster_size_map"
generated: true
description: "Per-voxel size (voxel count) of the connected component it belongs to."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.inference.cluster`](../nitrix-stats-inference-cluster.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:cluster_size_map -->
```python
cluster_size_map(labels: Int[Array, '*spatial']) -> Float[Array, '*spatial']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:cluster_size_map -->
Per-voxel size (voxel count) of the connected component it belongs to.

Every voxel of a component is assigned the number of voxels in that
component; background voxels (label `0`) map to `0`.  The count is
accumulated in the canonical floating dtype (`float64` under x64) so that
cluster sizes beyond `2**24` remain exactly representable.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:cluster_size_map -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `labels` | `Int` | `*spatial` | — | Integer label image of shape `(*spatial)`; `0` denotes background and `1 .. K` the connected components, as produced by `connected_components`. |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `*spatial`. Array of shape `(*spatial)` giving the voxel count of each voxel's component; background voxels carry `0`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:cluster_size_map -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `*spatial` | the spatial axes of a grid (variadic) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
